svg.text: AST node structure for JSDoc comments based on design/ast.md

g.text: Modified Types (common structure: span + inner TypeExpr)
NullableType(?T) | NonNullableType(!T) | OptionalType(T=) | VariadicType(...T) | ArrayShorthandType(T[]) | ParenthesizedType((T))
Recursive structure: TypeExpr variants contain nested TypeExpr nodes (tree)
e.g. Nullable(?T) -> TypeExpr | Union(T|U) -> Vec<TypeExpr> | TypeApplication(Array.<T>) -> Vec<TypeExpr>
